narrative:
Precinct Wakeman Village (precinct in Huron County) has 642 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.1%, a clear Republican lean of 6.1 percentage points.
